7.0.2.en: Fixed SDK v3 flow card crashes, resolved duplicate flow IDs, and patched unlinked gang capabilities on TS0003 switches. Improved battery/energy device stability with dynamic switching and strict value filtering. Added 6 new device fingerprints.

7.0.1.en: Fixed flow card crashes and device ID errors, resolved unlinked sub-gang controls on TS0003 switches, fixed duplicate flow trigger IDs, and added support for new device fingerprints.

7.0.0.en: Fixed flow trigger errors, TS0003 gang linking, and energy metering. Added TS110E support, optimized HOBEIAN sensors, and improved BVB stability for radar/LCD devices.

5.12.3.en: v5.12.2: Fixed energy multiplier for device _TZ3000_wzmuk9ai., Resolved connection issues for soil sensors and LCD sensors, adding new fingerprints., Added support for new device variants, enhancing compatibility with additional Zigbee devices.

5.12.2.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.12.2 adds support for new device variants and resolves several fingerprint issues.

5.12.1.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.12.1 adds support for new device variants and resolves several fingerprint issues.

5.12.0.en: Major stabilization release: Integrated Parallel Bot Handler for faster maintenance, fixed eWeLink/SONOFF plug support (Issue #194), and resolved multi-gang capability mapping bugs.

5.11.208.en: Added Zbeacon support and fixed fingerprint casing regression in Universal Tuya Zigbee app.

5.11.206.en: v5.11.205: Added 3 new fingerprints to improve device compatibility., Integrated 3 new fingerprints for better support of Zigbee devices.

5.11.205.en: Added 3 new fingerprints for enhanced device compatibility in Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.205.

5.11.204.en: Updated Universal Tuya Zigbee app to v5.11.204 with . Added support for Full State Card discovery.

5.11.203.en: Added universal support for all 4 Zigbee SOS reporting standards to emergency buttons, improving cross-brand compatibility. Added 3 new device fingerprints. Now supports 213 drivers.

5.11.202.en: Added support for new Tuya devices and improved pairing instructions.

5.11.201.en: Added 3 new device fingerprints including Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control. Fixed connection recovery and battery reporting for SOS emergency buttons.

5.11.200.en: Added support for ZG-204ZM and WiFi water sensor. Stabilized sleepy devices.

5.11.199.en: Added support for 3 new device fingerprints, including the Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control (_TZE284_ne4pikwm).

5.11.198.en: Added support for 3 new Tuya device fingerprints, including the Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control. Driver matrix updated with validated mappings.

5.11.197.en: Added support for 3 new Tuya device fingerprints and integrated 2,141 upstream device profiles to improve automatic pairing and driver matching.

5.11.196.en: Fixed pairing for 151 devices with uppercase manufacturer IDs, updated fingerprints across bulb, button, and sensor drivers, and improved overall Tuya Zigbee compatibility.

5.11.195.en: Bug fixes for climate sensor dual temperature display, critical SDK3 method crash fix, enhanced physical button flow support for multi-gang devices, and 28 new device fingerprints from community sources.

7.0.3.en: v7.0.2: Fixed 'is not a function' crash on flow card triggers by aligning with SDK v3 get*Card methods., Resolved duplicate Flow card trigger IDs that blocked validation and caused manual selection bugs., Fixed unlinked sub-gang capabilities on TS0003 multi-gang switches., Patched capability update crashes in wireless switches using safe value setters., Fixed duplicate flow ID arrays in hybrid ene
